---
title: "Feature: Purchase Categories & Tagging"
labels: ["enhancement", "medium-complexity", "analytics"]
category: "Analytics & Insights"
complexity: "Medium"
---

## Description
Allow users to categorize purchases (e.g., Electronics, Clothing, Food, Entertainment) and add custom tags.

## Benefits
- See which categories drain the most money/time
- Better understand spending patterns
- Filter purchase history by category

## Implementation Tasks
- [ ] Add `category` and `tags` fields to purchase schema
- [ ] Create category management UI
- [ ] Add filtering/grouping in purchase history
- [ ] Generate category-based statistics

## Related
- See IDEAS.md section: Analytics & Insights
- Complexity: Medium
